title: Perry
content:
{{Top|ca|leg|notoc=1}} {{Otheruses}} {{Character |type= |image= |name=Perry |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species= |gender= |pronouns= |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=*[[Outbound Flight Colony]]''[[Survivor's Quest]]'' **[[Peacekeeper (Outbound Flight Colony)|Peacekeepers]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Who's on Quarantine duty?''"
"''Perry and Quinze.|Jorad Pressor and Trilli|}} '''Perry''' was an individual who served a term as one of the law-enforcing [[Peacekeeper (Outbound Flight Colony)|Peacekeepers]] of the [[Outbound Flight Colony]], the government established by those who survived the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic's]] survey ship [[Outbound Flight Project|''Outbound Flight'']] after its crash in a [[Star cluster/Legends|star cluster]] called [[The Redoubt/Legends|the Redoubt]]. In [[22 ABY/Legends|22 ABY]],''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' the [[Human]] [[Trilli]] mentioned to fellow crewman [[Jorad Pressor]] that Perry was assigned with [[Quinze]] to guard the [[Quarantine section]], where the colony kept [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] children under surveillance. That [[Standard year/Legends|year]], [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Chak Fel]] was investigating the ruins of ''Outbound Flight'' when he discovered the small prison. A [[Unidentified attendant|female attendant]] watching over the children initially mistook him for Perry, but quickly realized he was someone else. ==Behind the scenes== Perry was mentioned in the [[2004]] novel ''[[Survivor's Quest]]'', written by [[Timothy Zahn]]. ==Appearances== *''[[Survivor's Quest]]'' {{Ab|Survivor's Quest (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1stm|in book}} *[[Survivor's Quest (abridged audiobook)|''Survivor's Quest'' abridged audiobook]] {{Mo}} ==Notes and references== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Perry}} {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Perry }} [[Category:Individuals of unspecified gender]] [[Category:Individuals of unspecified species]] [[Category:Individuals with unspecified pronouns]] [[Category:Outbound Flight Peacekeepers]]
